## Testing

- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run test` passes

## Scope check

- [ ] Change aligns with `SCOPE.md` (local-first, provider-agnostic, desktop-shaped).
- [ ] No secrets, recordings, transcripts, or API keys are committed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-facing.
- [ ] Docs updated if setup, packaging, or design changed.
